post.description: Creates a shipment record and triggers a background job to process it (e.g., call carrier API).
Authenticate and return access & refresh tokens
Invalidate the refresh token (optional specific token)
Obtain a new access token using a valid refresh token
Create a new account and returns a pair of JWT tokens
Resets password using a valid token received by email.
Sends an email verification link to the authenticated user's email.

get.description: Verifies email address using a token sent via email.
Retrieve all items in the authenticated user's cart

post.description: Add a product to the authenticated user's cart

put.description: Change quantity of a specific cart item

delete.description: Remove a specific item from the cart

get.description: Returns a paginated list of categories with optional filtering.

post.description: Creates a new product category. Only accessible by users with the "admin" role.
Creates multiple categories at once. Only accessible by users with the "admin" role.

delete.description:
Deletes multiple categories by their IDs. Only accessible by users with the "admin" role.
Cannot delete categories that have child categories – delete children first.

get.description: Returns a single category. Accepts either a numeric ID or a URL slug.
get.summary: Get a category by ID or slug

put.description: Updates an existing category by ID. Only accessible by users with the "admin" role.

delete.description:
Deletes a category by ID. Only accessible by users with the "admin" role.
Categories with child categories cannot be deleted – delete children first.

get.description: Returns the health status of the API and database
Returns paginated list of all orders with filtering by status, date, amount, and user ID.

post.description: Converts the authenticated user's cart into an order.

get.description: Returns all orders for the authenticated user (paginated).
Returns a single order for the authenticated user.
Get products with pagination and filtering by status, name, category, price range, and digital flag.

post.description: Add a new product to the catalog
Create multiple products in a single request (admin only)

delete.description: Soft delete multiple products by their IDs (admin only)

get.description: Fetch a single product using either its numeric ID or slug (URL-friendly name)
get.summary: Get product by ID or slug

put.description: Update an existing product by its ID

delete.description: Delete an existing product permanently from the catalog

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user

put.description: Updates the first name, last name, and phone number of the authenticated user

get.description: Returns all shipments belonging to an order (user must own the order).
Returns a shipment. Admin can see any; users see only shipments belonging to their orders.
Returns a paginated list of all users. Supports advanced filtering.

delete.description: Soft‑deletes a user by ID. Only accessible by users with the "admin" role.

valid.description: Valid is true if Time is not NULL

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and the JWT token.
